syncStatus.details: All three blocks have identical class strings in PHP and TSX for the container div

output.summary: Split pseudo-element inset shorthand into separate x/y axes across 3 carousel blocks (6 files) and added container vertical padding (py-10 md:py-15). This achieves the target inner charcoal padding of 72px mobile (40+32) and 92px desktop (60+32). CardsCarousel changes are correctly scoped to the conditional dark-mode branch only. Pattern documentation updated to match.
